heading: Modify Custom Roles
body:
Atlas CLI

To update a custom database role for your project using the
Atlas CLI, run the following command:

```sh

atlas customDbRoles update <roleName> [options]

```

To learn more about the command syntax and parameters, see the
Atlas CLI documentation for [atlas customDbRoles update](atlas/cli/current/command/atlas-customDbRoles-update).

Atlas Administration API

Atlas UI
